chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 762 - وَ سَأَلَهُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَى اَلرَّطْبَةِ اَلنَّابِتَةِ قَالَ «إِذَا أَلْصَقَ جَبْهَتَهُ عَلَى اَلْأَرْضِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.762 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked him (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about whether it is permissible for a man to pray on growing vegetation (fresh grass).
Imam (as) said: "If he places his forehead on the ground, then there is no harm."
